name: Walnut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks with 1-1/2 cups sugar until light lemon-colored.
2. Add nuts, biscuit crumbs, and lemon rind to the yolk mixture.
3. Beat egg whites until dry and gradually fold into the nut batter.
4. Grease two 9-inch cake pans lightly. Line each pan with wax paper, then grease and flour the wax paper.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pans and let stand for 5 minutes.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
7. Remove the pans from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
8. Carefully remove the cakes from the pans and place them on cooling racks to cool completely.
9. Whip the heavy cream until stiff peaks form. Gradually beat in 1/4 cup sugar, then stir in vanilla extract.
10. Spread the whipped cream mixture over one layer of cake. Place the second layer on top and spread with more whipped cream.
11. Decorate with additional apricot jam if desired.
